proposals.summary: Monthly statistics from India's Directorate General of Civil Aviation covering domestic passenger volumes, load factors, freight, and carrier-wise market shares. Researchers use it to track airline performance and city-pair demand across Indian routes.
proposals.bestFor: Tracking month-to-month domestic airline traffic, load factors, and city-pair passenger demand in India.
proposals.limitations: Data is published mainly as monthly PDF packs, so building consistent time series requires manual extraction and cleaning.
proposals.notes: Freely downloadable from the DGCA site; check the monthly reports section for the latest and archived packs.
